'''Aitha protein drink''', or just '''Aitha''', was a fairly tasty drink favored by athletes and spacers, and used to keep their bodies healthy. It was usually served hot. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] was known to enjoy it.

{{Food-stub}}
